name: Khon Kaen Sugar Industry Public Company Limited
summary: Khon Kaen Sugar Industry Public Company Limited manufactures and distributes sugar and by products in Thailand. The company offers raw sugar, high polarization sugar, white sugar, liquid sugar, and refined sugar, as well as molasses, bagasse, and filter cakes. It also manufactures and distributes bio-fertilizers; produces and distributes electricity and ethanol; exports sugar; and provides terminal and warehousing facilities. In addition, the company engages in the agricultural business; and provision of transport, goods shipping, and consulting services. Further, it operates a resort that provides accommodation and facilities for holiday vacation; a training center for employees and other general customers; and a commercial rental property. The company was founded in 1945 and is headquartered in Bangkok, Thailand.
